MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Sep-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Motion for Attorney's fees.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Miles Lendway, CSR#13684.

Tony Cho-on Hoh, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, YIP'S AUTO WORLD COLLISION REPAIR CENTER, INC.
Plaintiff's Motion for Attorney's fees is heard this day. After brief argument of counsel and reviewal the moving papers the court granted Motion for Attorney's fees in the amount $20,440.00. Counsel to prepare order and submit order for the court's signature.
The court in open court signed Amended Judgment to reflect the attorney's fees.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) AUTOBAHN COLLISION, LLC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that the plaintiffs shall recover damages from defendant AUTOBAHN COLLISION, LLC. in the amount of $272, 579.49
The judgment shall take effect immediately.
The Clerk is ordered to enter the judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
